description: Activate, strengthen and enhance your leg muscles with this pair of Shape-Ups Radius Trainer shoe from skechers. With a great mesh, synthetic leather and suede combination upper in attractive colors, these shoes are designed to activate your muscles, enhance maneuverability for a natural gait, and optimize support, flexibility and cushioning. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilationBrand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Advanced Stabilisation Insole (ASI) to prevent the foot from flexing before the proper point Rebound Air Technology that infuses air and propels your forward Two part firm-and-soft density midsole to create natural instability and deliver a rocking effect from the heel to the toe, activating muscles and reducing pressure on the joints and back Ultra-soft PU Kinetic Wedge extending from the heel to toe for gradual heel to toe transition, wherein the softer lower layer provides superior cushioning creating natural instability Outsole Roll Bridge on the high density rubber heel to increase side-to-side stability and utilise reinforced pillars to control your forward movement Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
